hero.title: Discover & Share AI Skills
hero.subtitle: Build powerful AI agents with community-driven skills

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Enterprise-grade security for your AI workflows

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Share and discover skills from developers worldwide

integration.title: Easy Integration
integration.description: Seamlessly integrate with your existing tools

landing.description: Self-hosted private skill registry, providing secure and efficient skill sharing and collaboration for teams
landing.whyDescription: Enterprise-grade skill management platform with complete publishing, discovery, and governance capabilities

privateDeploy.title: Private Deployment
privateDeploy.description: Fully self-hosted with data sovereignty. One-click deploy to your infrastructure, running securely behind your firewall.

versionControl.title: Version Control
versionControl.description: Semantic versioning, custom tags (beta, stable), automatic latest version tracking.

smartSearch.title: Smart Search
smartSearch.description: Full-text search with multi-dimensional filtering by namespace, downloads, ratings, and time.

teamwork.title: Team Collaboration
teamwork.description: Namespace management, role-based access control (Owner/Admin/Member), publishing policy configuration.

governance.title: Review & Governance
governance.description: Team-level review, platform-level approval, full audit trail, meeting compliance requirements.

cliFirst.title: CLI First
cliFirst.description: Native REST API, compatible with existing ClawHub CLI tools, no client-side changes needed.

landing.ctaDescription: Start your local development environment with a single command and experience the complete skill management workflow

home.subtitle: Modern Skill Registry
home.description: Efficient skill management, distribution, and collaboration platform for developers
home.popularDescription: Most popular skills in the community

login.title: Login to SkillHub
login.subtitle: Choose a method to continue
login.oauthHint: After GitHub authentication, you will be automatically redirected back to this site.
login.agreementPrefix: By logging in, you agree to our

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Register locally or sign in directly with OAuth.
register.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters with 3 character types
register.oauthHint: Sign in directly with your existing OAuth account, no local password needed.

device.title: Device Authorization
device.subtitle: Enter the 8-digit user code shown on your device
device.incompleteCode: Please enter the complete 8-digit user code
device.defaultError: Authorization failed, please check the user code
device.notice: After authorization, the device will have access to your account

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your account and API Tokens

myNamespaces.title: My Namespaces
myNamespaces.subtitle: Manage your namespaces and teams
myNamespaces.emptyDescription: Create a namespace to organize your skills

tokens.pageSubtitle: Manage access credentials for CLI and API

promotions.title: Promotion Review
promotions.subtitle: Review team skill promotion requests to global namespace

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.subtitle: Manage platform users and permissions
adminUsers.changeRoleDesc: Assign a new role to user {{username}}
adminUsers.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable user {{username}}?
adminUsers.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to enable user {{username}}?

security.title: Security Settings
security.subtitle: Update your password when local account login is enabled.

accounts.initiateDesc: Enter the secondary account identifier. Supports local username or `provider:subject` format for external identities.
accounts.verifyDesc: Complete token verification first, then confirm to execute data migration.
accounts.verifySuccess: Verification successful, confirm to execute the merge

namespace.emptyDescription: No skills have been published in this namespace yet

skillDetail.notFoundDesc: This skill may have been deleted or never existed

upload.dragHint: Drag a ZIP file here, or click to select

layout.footerDescription: Modern skill registry, providing efficient skill management and distribution for developers.

createToken.title: Create API Token
createToken.description: Create a new API Token for CLI or API access

publish.title: Publish Skill
publish.subtitle: Upload skill package to SkillHub

reviewNotice.title: Review Notice
reviewNotice.description: Submitted skill packages require admin review before publication. Once approved, your skill will be visible to all users.

publish.successDescription: {{skill}} has been submitted for review and will be available after admin approval

review.rejectReasonRequired: A reason is required when rejecting
review.approveDescription: Are you sure you want to approve this review?
review.rejectDescription: Are you sure you want to reject this review?

token.title: API Tokens
token.emptyHint: Click the button above to create your first token
token.name: Name
token.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete token "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
